title: webhook — health probes
description: Four probes registered with foundation's HealthAggregator.

probes.name: webhook-deliveries-oldest-pending
probes.description: Age of the oldest WebhookDelivery in state=pending or state=inFlight. Warns > 5m, fails > 30m.

probes.name: webhook-subscriptions-reachable
probes.description: Aggregate probe status: % of active subscriptions with consecutive_probe_failures = 0. Warns < 95%, fails < 70%.

probes.name: webhook-batch-dispatcher-alive
probes.description: The notifications queue has at least one worker processing Bus::batch webhook jobs. Fails when the queue starves.
